calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields #7235

ELIZABETH MACDONALD, Esq. for Plaintiff: CITIBANK.
Plaintiff's Witness RAMONA ARAGON BY DECLARATION.
No appearance by defendant JAIME OSORIO.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $10,862.59
Costs - $460.00
Total - $11,322.59

PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT & SUBMIT TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Set For Trial On Jun-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
